title: Consumer prices rose 3.3% in March, as energy prices spiked due to Iran conflict
summary_full: The consumer price index was expected to show a 3.3% year-over-year gain in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus.
summary_public: The consumer price index was expected to show a 3.3% year-over-year gain in March, according to the Dow Jones consensus.

IR.label: negative
IR.evidence: energy prices spiked due to Iran conflict
